body:
## Summary
- add retention and learning tests for malformed streak-freeze counters
- mirror the counter normalization contract in `validate:content` with 14 streak-rule checks
- prove invalid `available`, `lifetimeEarned`, and `lifetimeSpent` values normalize before refill/spend math

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/v1-1-retention-selectors.test.js scripts/learning.test.js --test-name-pattern 'streakWithFreeze|refillFreezes|available|lifetimeEarned|lifetimeSpent|finite|NaN|negative|fractional|string'`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
title: test: guard streak freeze counter normalization
